perturbation.original_text: WHEREAS, Heritage and Premier entered into the Agreement; WHEREAS, the Parties wish to amend the Agreement in accordance with the terms and conditions set forth herein.
perturbation.changed_text: WHEREAS, Heritage and Premier entered into a prior agreement; WHEREAS, the Parties wish to enter into a new agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'the Agreement' to 'a prior agreement' and 'amend the Agreement' to 'enter into a new agreement' creates confusion about whether the original agreement is still valid or entirely replaced. This contradicts the later statement that 'all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect,' because it is not clear if 'the Agreement' refers to the previous one or a new document.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as otherwise specified above in this Amendment, all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'the Agreement' to 'a prior agreement' and 'amend the Agreement' to 'enter into a new agreement' introduces uncertainty about the validity of the original agreement. This directly contradicts the statement that 'all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect' because it's unclear whether 'the Agreement' being referenced is the original one or a completely new document. This ambiguity creates a strong in-text contradiction regarding which agreement's terms are actually in effect. The perturbed text falls under Omissions - In Text Contradiction because changing essential language in one section creates a contradiction with obligations stated in other sections.

perturbation.original_text: The Parties hereby agree to remove Schedule C-1 in its entirety and replace it with the following: Schedule C-1. The following is attached to an incorporated into the Agreement as Schedule C-1: Schedule C-1([***]) [***]
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties hereby agree to consider revising Schedule C-1 at a later date. Further details will be provided subsequently.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the definitive 'remove Schedule C-1 and replace it' to a tentative 'consider revising Schedule C-1 at a later date' introduces uncertainty. If Schedule C-1 contains crucial pricing or product specifications, this change contradicts the clause that 'all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect,' since it implies that Schedule C-1 might be subject to change and its impact on the whole contract is undefined until the details are provided. Also, the change contradicts the section that says 'Schedule C-1. The following is attached to an incorporated into the Agreement as Schedule C-1: Schedule C-1([***]) [***]' because the changed text refers to a pending decision not an action to follow Schedule C-1.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The following is attached to an incorporated into the Agreement as Schedule C-1: Schedule C-1([***]) [***]
perturbation.justification: The changed text, which states the parties will 'consider revising Schedule C-1 at a later date,' directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states, 'The following is attached to an incorporated into the Agreement as Schedule C-1: Schedule C-1([***]) [***].' The original text committed to having a Schedule C-1 as part of the agreement, and the changed text makes the inclusion of that schedule uncertain, contradicting the initial inclusion and thus creating an omission in text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: This Amendment No. 3 (the "Third Amendment"), entered into by and between Stremicks Heritage Foods, LLC ("Heritage") Premier Nutrition Corporation ("Premier") is effective as of July 3, 2019 ("Third Amendment Effective Date") and amends that certain Manufacturing Agreement between Heritage and Premier dated July 1, 2017 as amended ("Agreement").
perturbation.changed_text: This document, entered into by and between Stremicks Heritage Foods, LLC ("Heritage") Premier Nutrition Corporation ("Premier"), is effective as of July 3, 2019. It serves as a discussion document between Heritage and Premier.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'This Amendment No. 3' to 'This document' and stating it is a 'discussion document' contradicts the characterization of this as an amendment and undermines the legally binding intention of the document. It conflicts with the subsequent statement about the existing agreement and later amendments. If it's only a discussion document, the rest of the text regarding the agreement terms becoming effective would be contradicting because the text is implying that is only a discussion and no legal actions are to be taken.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as otherwise specified above in this Amendment, all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.justification: The changed text redefines the document from 'Amendment No. 3' to a mere 'discussion document.' This directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text,' which states that 'all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.' If the document is merely for discussion, it cannot simultaneously amend an existing agreement and keep its terms in full force. This constitutes a strong in-text contradiction because it fundamentally undermines the legally binding nature of the amendment. This is an Omission-In Text Contradiction
